  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Other CNR1

La_Manno

CNR1_manno <- read_csv('/home/josema/Downloads/manno_Cannabinoids.csv')
Manno_mouse_meta <- read.csv('/home/josema/Downloads/manno_metadata.csv') 

com_class_order= c('Other','PROG', 'IPC', 'NEU')
age_order_manno=c('e7.0', 'e8.0', 'e8.5', 'e9.0', 'e10.0',
  'e11.0', 'e12.0', 'e12.5', 'e13.0','e13.5',
  'e14.0', 'e14.5', 'e15.0','e15.5', 'e16.0',
  'e16.25','e16.5', 'e17.0', 'e17.5','e18.0')

Manno_CNR1_exp_meta <- inner_join(CNR1_manno, Manno_mouse_meta, by=c('Cell_Id'='X')) %>%   
  mutate(com_class= case_when(Class.x == 'Neuron' ~ 'NEU',
                              Class.x == 'Neuroblast' ~ 'IPC',
                              Class.x %in% c('Radial glia', 'Neural tube','Neural crest') ~ 'PROG',
                              TRUE ~ 'Other'),
         com_class= factor(com_class,levels=com_class_order),
         Age=factor(Age.x, levels=age_order_manno)) %>%
  filter(com_class!='Other')


Manno_dotplot_data <- Manno_CNR1_exp_meta %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(Cnr1, Cnr2, Napepld, Mgll, Daglb, Dagla, Cnrip1, Faah), names_to = 'Gene', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
  group_by(com_class,Age, Tissue, Gene) %>% 
  summarise(N=n(),
            Avg=mean(Expression,na.rm=TRUE),
            Percent= (sum(Expression>0)/n())) %>% 
  group_by(Tissue, Gene) %>% 
  mutate(`0_max`=(Avg- 0) /(max(Avg)-0)) %>% 
  mutate(dataset='Manno') %>% 
  ungroup()

Manno_dotplot_data %>% 
  mutate(Age=factor(Age, levels=age_order_manno),
         com_class = factor(com_class, levels=com_class_order) ) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, is.nan(.x), 0))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Age, y=Gene, fill=`0_max`))+
  geom_tile(color='gray30')+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#caf0f8",high = '#03045e')+
  theme_classic()+
  facet_grid(Tissue~com_class, switch = 'y', scales = 'free', space='free')+
  theme( axis.text.x = element_text( angle = 90,vjust=0.5,hjust = 1),
         strip.placement = "outside",
         strip.background.x=element_rect(color = NA,
                                        fill=NA), 
        strip.background.y=element_blank(),
        strip.text.x.top = element_text(face = 'bold', color = 'gray30'),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray50", fill = NA),
                  panel.grid.major.x  = element_blank() )+
    guides(size=guide_legend(nrow=1, byrow=TRUE,title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5),
           fill = guide_colourbar(title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5))+
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0,2))+
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust=1, hjust=1, size = 5)) 
Manno_dotplot_data %>% 
  mutate(Age=factor(Age, levels=age_order_manno),
         com_class = factor(com_class, levels=com_class_order) ) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, is.nan(.x), 0))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Age, y=Gene, fill=`0_max`))+
  geom_tile(color='gray30')+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#caf0f8",high = '#03045e')+
  theme_classic()+
  facet_grid(Gene~com_class, switch = 'y', scales = 'free', space='free')+
  theme( axis.text.x = element_text( angle = 90,vjust=0.5,hjust = 1),
                  legend.position = 'bottom',
         strip.placement = "outside",
         strip.background.x=element_rect(color = NA,
                                        fill=NA), 
        strip.background.y=element_blank(),
                strip.text.y.left = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x.top = element_text(face = 'bold', color = 'gray30'),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray50", fill = NA),
                  panel.grid.major.x  = element_blank() )+
    guides(size=guide_legend(nrow=1, byrow=TRUE,title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5),
           fill = guide_colourbar(title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5))+
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0,2))+
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust=1, hjust=1, size = 5)) 

Warning: There were 2 warnings in `mutate()`.
The first warning was:
ℹ In argument: `across(everything(), ~replace(.x, is.nan(.x), 0))`.
Caused by warning in `[<-.factor`:
! invalid factor level, NA generated
ℹ Run ]8;;ide:run:dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()]8;; to see the 1 remaining warning.


Manno_CNR1_exp_meta <- inner_join(CNR1_manno, Manno_mouse_meta, by=c('Cell_Id'='X')) %>%   
  mutate(com_class= case_when(Class.x == 'Neuron' ~ 'NEU',
                              Class.x == 'Neuroblast' ~ 'IPC',
                              Class.x %in% c('Radial glia', 'Neural tube','Neural crest') ~ 'PROG',
                              TRUE ~ 'Other'),
         com_class= factor(com_class,levels=com_class_order),
         Age=factor(Age.x, levels=age_order_manno)) 

Manno_dotplot_data_all <- Manno_CNR1_exp_meta %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(Cnr1, Cnr2, Napepld, Mgll, Daglb, Dagla, Cnrip1, Faah), names_to = 'Gene', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
  group_by(Class.y,Age, Gene) %>% 
  summarise(N=n(),
            Avg=mean(Expression,na.rm=TRUE),
            Percent= (sum(Expression>0)/n())) %>% 
  group_by(Gene) %>% 
  mutate(`0_max`=(Avg- 0) /(max(Avg)-0)) %>% 
  mutate(dataset='Manno') %>% 
  ungroup()
Manno_dotplot_data_all %>% 
  mutate(Age=factor(Age, levels=age_order_manno) ) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, is.nan(.x), 0))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Age, y=Gene, fill=`0_max`))+
  geom_tile(color='gray30')+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#caf0f8",high = '#03045e')+
  theme_classic()+
  facet_grid(Gene~Class.y, switch = 'y', scales = 'free', space='free')+
  theme( axis.text.x = element_text( angle = 90,vjust=0.5,hjust = 1),
                  legend.position = 'bottom',
         strip.placement = "outside",
         strip.background.x=element_rect(color = NA,
                                        fill=NA), 
        strip.background.y=element_blank(),
                strip.text.y.left = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x.top = element_text(face = 'bold', color = 'gray30'),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray50", fill = NA),
                  panel.grid.major.x  = element_blank() )+
    guides(size=guide_legend(nrow=1, byrow=TRUE,title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5),
           fill = guide_colourbar(title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5))+
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0,2))+
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust=1, hjust=1, size = 5))

Noak

Di bella

dibella_expression <- Matrix::readMM('/home/josema/Downloads/gene_sorted-matrix.mtx')
dibella_Metadata <- read_tsv('/home/josema/Downloads/metaData_scDevSC.txt') %>% slice(-1)
dibella_genes <-  read_tsv('/home/josema/Downloads/genes(1).tsv',col_names = F)

colnames(dibella_expression) <- dibella_Metadata %>% pull(NAME)
rownames(dibella_expression) <- dibella_genes %>% pull(X1)

dibella_expression_CNR1 <- dibella_expression[c("Cnr1","Cnr2",'Napepld','Faah','Mgll','Daglb','Dagla','Cnrip1'),] %>% as.matrix() %>%  t()  %>% as.data.frame() %>%  set_names(c("Cnr1","Cnr2",'Napepld','Faah','Mgll','Daglb','Dagla','Cnrip1'))
dibella_UMAP <- read_tsv('/home/josema/Downloads/cluster_scDevSC.merged.umap.txt')%>% slice(-1)

com_class_order= c('Other','PROG', 'IPC', 'NEU')


dibella_merged <- dibella_Metadata %>%  
  cbind(dibella_expression_CNR1) %>% 
  inner_join(dibella_UMAP,by='NAME') %>% 
  mutate(com_class= case_when(New_cellType %in% c('Cajal Retzius cells','CThPN',
                                       'DL CPN','DL_CPN_1','DL_CPN_2',
                                       'Immature neurons','Interneurons',
                                       'Layer 4','Layer 6b','Migrating neurons',
                                       'SCPN','UL CPN') ~ 'NEU',
                              New_cellType%in% c('Apical progenitors') ~ 'PROG',
                              New_cellType%in% c('Intermediate progenitors') ~ 'IPC',
                              TRUE ~ 'Other'),
         X=as.numeric(X),
         Y=as.numeric(Y)) %>% 
  filter(com_class!='Other')

dibella_merged %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Cnr1,Cnr2,Napepld,Faah,Mgll,Daglb,Dagla,Cnrip1), names_to = 'Gene', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
    group_by(com_class,orig_ident, Gene) %>% 
  summarise(N=n(),
            Avg=mean(Expression,na.rm=TRUE),
            Percent= (sum(Expression>0)/n())) %>% 
  group_by(Gene) %>% 
  mutate(`0_max`=(Avg- 0) /(max(Avg)-0)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(Age=factor(orig_ident),
         com_class = factor(com_class, levels=com_class_order) ) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, is.nan(.x), 0))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Age, y=Gene, fill=`0_max`))+
  geom_tile(color='gray30')+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#caf0f8",high = '#03045e')+
  theme_classic()+
  facet_grid(Gene~com_class, switch = 'y', scales = 'free', space='free')+
  theme( axis.text.x = element_text( angle = 90,vjust=0.5,hjust = 1),
                  legend.position = 'bottom',
         strip.placement = "outside",
         strip.background.x=element_rect(color = NA,
                                        fill=NA), 
        strip.background.y=element_blank(),
                strip.text.y.left = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x.top = element_text(face = 'bold', color = 'gray30'),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray50", fill = NA),
                  panel.grid.major.x  = element_blank() )+
    guides(size=guide_legend(nrow=1, byrow=TRUE,title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5),
           fill = guide_colourbar(title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5))+
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0,2))+
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust=1, hjust=1, size = 5))

Micali

UMAP_coordinates %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(CNR1,CNR2,NAPEPLD,FAAH,FAAH2,MGLL,DAGLB,DAGLA,CNRIP1), names_to = 'Gene', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
    group_by(com_class,Age, Gene) %>% 
  summarise(N=n(),
            Avg=mean(Expression,na.rm=TRUE),
            Percent= (sum(Expression>0)/n())) %>% 
  group_by(Gene) %>% 
  mutate(`0_max`=(Avg- 0) /(max(Avg)-0)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(
         com_class = factor(com_class, levels=com_class_order) ) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, is.nan(.x), 0))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Age, y=Gene, fill=`0_max`))+
  geom_tile(color='gray30')+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#caf0f8",high = '#03045e')+
  theme_classic()+
  facet_grid(Gene~com_class, switch = 'y', scales = 'free', space='free')+
  theme( axis.text.x = element_text( angle = 90,vjust=0.5,hjust = 1),
                  legend.position = 'bottom',
         strip.placement = "outside",
         strip.background.x=element_rect(color = NA,
                                        fill=NA), 
        strip.background.y=element_blank(),
                strip.text.y.left = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x.top = element_text(face = 'bold', color = 'gray30'),
        axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray50", fill = NA),
                  panel.grid.major.x  = element_blank() )+
    guides(size=guide_legend(nrow=1, byrow=TRUE,title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5),
           fill = guide_colourbar(title.position="top", title.hjust = 0.5))+
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0,2))+
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust=1, hjust=1, size = 5))
